hero.eyebrow: Senior software engineer building revenue-critical systems
hero.headline: I build scalable SaaS platforms and real-world systems used in production.
hero.description: Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years building multi-tenant billing platforms, agricultural management systems, and business software that supports real operational workflows.
hero.authorityLine: Built production systems including a multi-tenant billing platform and agricultural management system.
hero.proofC: Production systems across Angola, Brazil, and Europe

about.label: 01 - POSITIONING
about.title: Senior engineer focused on
about.p1: I am a Software Engineer with over 6 years of experience building production-ready systems that solve real operational problems.
about.p2: My work focuses on designing scalable SaaS platforms, including multi-tenant billing systems and agricultural management solutions tailored to real business environments.
about.p3: I have experience working in high-demand scenarios, managing multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining system quality, performance, and reliability.
about.p4: I approach software engineering as a system design problem, prioritizing scalability, maintainability, and real-world usability over quick solutions.
about.projects: Systems across billing, agriculture, finance, and operations
about.proofTitle: Built for real workflows, not tutorial portfolios
about.proofItemADesc: I work from business problem to system design, delivery, and operational fit.
about.proofItemBDesc: I have shipped products under pressure, across multiple projects, with accountability for quality and outcomes.

expertise.label: 02 - WHAT I BUILD
expertise.title: Systems I build
expertise.subtitle: This portfolio is intentionally focused on software that moves operations, revenue, and decision-making.
expertise.frontendDesc: Shared platforms where multiple businesses operate independently with the right boundaries, permissions, and workflows.
expertise.fullstackDesc: Revenue-critical products that combine invoicing, POS, payment tracking, receivables, and reporting.
expertise.aiDesc: Operational platforms for farms and production teams with planning, inventory, field activity, and execution visibility.
expertise.systemDesc: Admin platforms and process automation tools that reduce manual work and make teams faster and more reliable.

projects.label: 03 - CASE STUDIES
projects.title: Selected work
projects.subtitle: A curated set of systems that best reflect ownership, architecture depth, and business impact.

kibera.description: A production-ready SaaS billing platform designed to support multiple businesses within a single system. Used by businesses to manage billing, invoices, payments, POS operations, and customer data in real-world scenarios.
kibera.role: Businesses, finance teams, operators, and administrators managing day-to-day billing and payment workflows.
kibera.impact: Designed with multi-tenancy to support multiple independent companies within one platform, with strong data isolation, lower operational errors, and more scalable business workflows.

cafe.description: A comprehensive system designed to manage agricultural operations from planning to execution. Supports property management, crop planning, irrigation tracking, pest control, inventory, and financial monitoring.
cafe.role: Farm managers and operational teams responsible for planning, execution, productivity, and production control.
cafe.impact: Built to handle structured agricultural workflows and long-term operational use, improving organization, traceability, and decision-making in real farm environments.

kitandasoft.description: A suite of management tools covering ERP, POS, invoicing, CRM, and related operational workflows. Built for businesses that need a practical system to run daily operations, not isolated features.
kitandasoft.role: Business operators, finance teams, and managers responsible for commercial operations.
kitandasoft.impact: Consolidated key operational workflows into one structured system and supported real company execution at scale.

dealbusinesshub.description: A marketplace platform for buying and selling businesses and real estate, requiring product clarity, scalable flows, and delivery quality aligned with an international market.
dealbusinesshub.role: Marketplace operators, buyers, sellers, and business stakeholders in the European market.
dealbusinesshub.impact: Supported a more credible and scalable transaction platform for a category where trust, structure, and workflow quality matter.

nzimbupay.description: A financial application involving transactional workflows, sensitive data handling, reporting, and database administration responsibilities in a production environment.
nzimbupay.role: Financial operators and internal teams working with transaction and reporting workflows.
nzimbupay.impact: Strengthened reporting and operational support in a domain where reliability and data integrity are essential.

sadoc.description: A remittance and exchange application focused on critical frontend flows such as authentication, validation-heavy forms, exchange calculation, and responsive transactional UX.
sadoc.role: Users sending or managing international remittance and currency exchange operations.
sadoc.impact: Improved usability in a complex transactional flow where trust, clarity, and accurate input handling directly affect conversion.

rokiz.description: A modern community forum platform built for engagement and discussions. Provides a responsive interface for users to create topics, participate in conversations, and connect with like-minded individuals.
rokiz.role: Community members, moderators, and administrators managing discussions and community growth.
rokiz.impact: Enabled an accessible and engaging platform for community-driven conversations with clean UX and responsive design.

ngola.description: A comprehensive marketplace platform connecting service providers with customers. Includes service discovery, booking management, and real-time communication features.
ngola.role: Service providers and customers seeking reliable services in their area.
ngola.impact: Built a trusted marketplace that improved service accessibility and provider visibility in the local market.

uaushow.description: A platform dedicated to entertainment events, shows, and cultural activities. Provides event discovery, ticketing, and community engagement features.
uaushow.role: Event organizers, performers, and entertainment enthusiasts.
uaushow.impact: Centralized event discovery and ticketing, making it easier for audiences to find and attend entertainment events.

terapia.description: A digital platform connecting individuals with therapy and wellness services. Supports appointment scheduling, resource access, and mental health support.
terapia.role: Therapists, wellness coaches, and individuals seeking mental health support.
terapia.impact: Made mental health services more accessible and reduced barriers to finding professional support.

penttinali.description: An elegant e-commerce platform for luxury fashion products. Features high-quality product displays, secure checkout, and personalized shopping experience.
penttinali.role: Fashion enthusiasts and luxury brand customers.
penttinali.impact: Created a premium shopping experience that reflected brand prestige and enhanced customer trust.

ayonas.description: A transportation platform offering logistics services and vehicle rental options. Provides booking management, fleet visibility, and customer support.
ayonas.role: Businesses and individuals requiring transportation and logistics solutions.
ayonas.impact: Streamlined transportation operations and improved service availability for customers.

ozuna.description: A platform dedicated to music promotion and artist discovery. Supports music sharing, artist profiles, and audience engagement.
ozuna.impact: Provided artists with tools to reach audiences and built community engagement around music content.

elizandra.description: A professional portfolio website showcasing work, skills, and professional background. Designed to create strong first impressions and demonstrate expertise.
elizandra.role: Professional contacts, employers, and business partners.
elizandra.impact: Established a credible online presence and professional brand with quality presentation.

sikolasoft.description: A comprehensive school management platform handling student records, grades, attendance, and administrative workflows. Built for educational institutions.
sikolasoft.role: School administrators, teachers, parents, and students.
sikolasoft.impact: Simplified school operations, improved administrative efficiency, and enhanced communication between stakeholders.

kiari.description: A complete event management solution for organizing and promoting events. Features ticket sales, attendee management, and event analytics.
kiari.impact: Reduced event organization complexity and improved attendance tracking and audience engagement.

eco.description: A platform connecting students with tutors for personalized learning. Features lesson scheduling, progress tracking, and educational content management.
eco.impact: Expanded access to quality tutoring services and made personalized education more affordable.

hotel.description: A comprehensive system for hotel operations including room booking, guest management, staff scheduling, and billing.
hotel.impact: Improved operational efficiency and guest experience through streamlined booking and management processes.

xgrow.description: An interactive learning platform providing courses, interactive lessons, and progress tracking. Built with focus on user engagement and learning outcomes.
xgrow.role: Students and learners seeking quality educational content.
xgrow.impact: Made quality education accessible with an engaging platform that improved learning retention.

macovi.description: A platform for sports club operations including membership management, event scheduling, and member communications.
macovi.impact: Centralized club operations and improved member engagement through organized event management.

femb.description: A comprehensive platform for financial services and business support. Provides business tools, financial resources, and professional guidance.
femb.role: Business owners and financial services clients.
femb.impact: Provided integrated business support that helped entrepreneurs manage finances and operations more effectively.

docampo.description: A document management platform for organizing, storing, and retrieving important documents. Features secure access and version control.
docampo.role: Individuals and businesses managing document workflows.
docampo.impact: Improved document organization and reduced time spent searching for and managing files.

stmaze.description: An interactive platform for maze adventures and interactive storytelling. Provides engaging entertainment with puzzle-solving elements.
stmaze.impact: Created an engaging entertainment experience that combined storytelling with interactive challenges.

mambo.description: A weather information platform providing accurate forecasts, weather alerts, and climate data. Features intuitive interface and location-based services.
mambo.role: Weather enthusiasts and general users needing weather information.
mambo.impact: Delivered accessible weather information with beautiful presentation and reliable forecasting.

experience.label: 04 - EXPERIENCE
experience.title: Experience built around delivery
experience.subtitle: I have worked across product, platform, and internal systems with consistent ownership in production environments.

devtest.description: Leading and shipping multiple production systems in parallel, with responsibility that goes beyond feature delivery into architecture, implementation quality, and execution under pressure.

highlights.1: Worked across multiple active products at the same time without sacrificing delivery quality.
highlights.2: Built and supported platforms in domains such as agriculture, smart cities, cybersecurity, transport, and internal operations.
highlights.3: Took part in technical structuring decisions instead of acting only as an implementer.
highlights.4: Delivered systems meant for real users, real workflows, and ongoing production use.
highlights.5: Operated effectively in a high-demand environment with limited capacity and strong delivery expectations.

tailordeal.description: Senior developer and tech lead on a European marketplace product, contributing to platform quality, scalability, and implementation direction.

highlights.1: Worked on a marketplace product serving an international audience and a more mature market expectation.
highlights.2: Contributed to architectural direction and implementation quality using Blazor and .NET 8.
highlights.3: Balanced delivery speed with product credibility and maintainability.
highlights.4: Operated remotely with cross-border collaboration requirements.

eco.description: Senior developer and tech lead on an education product, helping shape delivery and interface quality for a platform serving real students and operators.

highlights.1: Owned frontend delivery quality for a live education product.
highlights.2: Worked across dashboards, learning flows, and operational interfaces.
highlights.3: Contributed as a senior individual contributor with leadership responsibility.

gclucan.description: A defining period for enterprise software delivery, building management systems used by real businesses across Angola.

highlights.1: Worked on software used by more than 300 companies in real operational environments.
highlights.2: Delivered systems across ERP, education, hospitality, invoicing, CRM, and reporting.
highlights.3: Combined development work with technical leadership and product structuring responsibilities.
highlights.4: Handled enterprise reporting and operational data requirements using DevExpress and related tooling.
highlights.5: Built credibility through systems that had to keep working after delivery, not just demo well.

snir.description: Worked on financial and insurance systems where reporting quality, database reliability, and sensitive workflows were central to the work.

highlights.1: Contributed across frontend, backend, reporting, and database administration responsibilities.
highlights.2: Worked on financial and insurance-related systems with higher reliability expectations.
highlights.3: Handled SQL Server administration and performance-sensitive workflows.
highlights.4: Built reporting capabilities that supported business and operational visibility.

teclat.description: Frontend engineer focused on transactional product flows for a remittance and exchange platform.

highlights.1: Built validation-heavy transactional flows with strong UX requirements.
highlights.2: Worked on authentication, exchange calculation, and responsive forms.
highlights.3: Contributed to a product where user trust depended on interface clarity and correctness.

xgrow.description: Frontend engineer on an education platform, contributing to core product features in a remote team context.

highlights.1: Delivered product features used in a live learning environment.
highlights.2: Worked inside a structured delivery process with GitFlow, Jira, and collaborative engineering routines.
highlights.3: Built maintainable UI logic for a real product, not one-off pages.

learning.label: 05 - ENGINEERING APPROACH
learning.title: How I work
learning.subtitle: I design systems with a focus on scalability, reliability, and real-world usage under operational constraints.
learning.learningSubtitle: I prioritize scalable architecture, proper data boundaries, and maintainability over quick implementation shortcuts.
learning.principleA: Design for multi-tenancy and data isolation
learning.principleADesc: I design systems with multi-tenancy in mind, ensuring proper data isolation, clear boundaries, and room for scalable growth.
learning.principleBDesc: I prioritize architectures and codebases that remain understandable, adaptable, and sustainable as products evolve.
learning.principleC: Model real workflows, not idealized demos
learning.principleCDesc: I focus on structured data, operational scenarios, and business workflows that reflect how people actually use the system.
learning.principleDDesc: I optimize for production reliability, performance under real conditions, and systems that continue to work as they grow.
learning.valueSubtitle: I am open to senior remote roles where ownership, product quality, and business impact matter.
learning.endToEndDesc: I can move from problem framing and system design to implementation and delivery without needing heavy supervision.
learning.internationalDesc: I have worked across Angola, Brazil, and Europe and can operate effectively in remote, cross-cultural teams.
learning.businessDesc: I focus on systems that change how teams operate, not just feature counts or visual polish.
learning.learnerDesc: If you need a senior engineer who can take ownership of business-critical systems and ship production-ready software, let's talk.
